falsification_attempt: Checked whether the old async_exec.rs test still maps to a live v2.2 primitive. The old Transaction::AsyncCommitment test shape is stale; the active invariant is canonical TxAsyncCommitment lifecycle transition, now covered by a focused unit regression.
missed_risks: This does not reintroduce a full e2e test under crates/transaction-pool/tests/it; broader happy-path coverage remains the gold1p traffic suite.
notes: The replacement test is intentionally lower-level and deterministic.
